description: Math engine lifecycle hooks. Precision-first, verify computations.

hooks.prompt:
DOMAIN: math-skill-system
IF task involves: mathematical computation, symbolic math, statistics, data science analysis, proofs, or numerical verification
THEN: Read ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/SKILL.md for computational methodology.
RULE: Use deterministic tools (SymPy, numpy) for computation. Never rely on mental math for critical calculations.

VERIFY: If mathematical claims were made, were they verified with deterministic computation (not LLM estimation)?
IF_NO: Run verification before completing.
